reviews.comment:
Si vas sobre el horario de la comida se junta mucha gente. los baños impecables y la atención es buena pero muy lerda.

(Translated by Google)
If you go around lunchtime, it gets very crowded. The bathrooms are spotless and the service is good but very slow.

reviews.comment:
Bueno, agua caliente gratis.
Tampoco te ofrecen limpieza de parabrisas y control de agua y aceite

(Translated by Google)
Well, free hot water.
But they don't offer windshield cleaning or oil and water checks.
